jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - NSDC - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the NSDC family as a Senior Teacher in Hyderabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About NSDC:
NSDC is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSDC!
